transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-27]
[00:00] You: Partnership strategy discussion. If we were to partner with Zendesk for joint go-to-market, what would that look like?
[00:35] Speaker 1: Hypothetically, we'd need a co-selling agreement, shared sales training, and joint marketing materials. It would be a 6-month process.
[01:10] Speaker 2: We'd also need a technical integration — probably 3 months of engineering work.
[01:45] Speaker 3: If we go that route, someone would need to lead the partnership from our side. That could be a full-time role.
[02:15] You: This is good to think about. But we're not ready to pursue it yet — maybe in 2027 when we have more resources.
[02:40] Speaker 1: Agreed. Let's table it.
[02:55] You: What I do want to commit to is reaching out to Zendesk next quarter just to start a relationship. I'll send an intro email to their VP of Partnerships by September 1st.
[03:30] Speaker 2: That's a good start. I'll put together a one-page partnership brief we can use in that outreach by August 20th.
[03:55] You: Perfect. Keep it exploratory for now.

adversarial_injections.description: Co-selling agreement, joint marketing materials, shared sales training are hypothetical future partnership components — explicitly not being pursued now; 'we're not ready to pursue it yet' disavows the commitment
Technical integration for Zendesk partnership — hypothetical, not a commitment; the meeting concluded with tabling the partnership idea
Partnership lead role — hypothetical future staffing need if partnership proceeds, which was explicitly deferred to 2027

action_items.description: Send intro email to Zendesk VP of Partnerships to begin relationship
action_items.source_quote: I'll send an intro email to their VP of Partnerships by September 1st.

action_items.description: Create one-page partnership brief for Zendesk outreach
action_items.source_quote: I'll put together a one-page partnership brief we can use in that outreach by August 20th.

decisions: Zendesk partnership deferred to 2027 — exploratory outreach only for now
